name: foreman-os-marketplace
description: Construction superintendent operating system plugin with 42 skills, 37 commands, and 21 field-reference documents for daily reporting, scheduling, document intelligence, and project management.

plugins.name: foreman-os
plugins.description: Complete construction superintendent operating system — 42 skills, 37 commands, 21 field-reference documents. Daily reporting, 3-week look-ahead planning, RFI/submittal management, weekly owner reports, material tracking, dashboards, closeout/commissioning, deep document intelligence, and AutoCAD DWG extraction.

plugins.name: foremanos-stack
plugins.description: ForemanOS stack patterns — Prisma 6.7 conventions, NextAuth RBAC (4-role hierarchy), Redis caching with graceful degradation, SWR data fetching patterns, Trigger.dev v3 task definitions. Includes schema drift and auth pattern hooks.

plugins.name: foremanos-llm
plugins.description: ForemanOS LLM system patterns — multi-provider orchestration (Claude/OpenAI/Gemini), three-pass vision pipeline, RAG architecture with 25 modules, prompt template patterns. Includes llm-cost-analyzer agent.

plugins.name: foremanos-testing
plugins.description: ForemanOS testing patterns — Vitest conventions (vi.hoisted, pool:forks, shared mocks), API route testing with session/Prisma mocking. Includes /test-coverage-report command.

plugins.name: foremanos-documents
plugins.description: ForemanOS document patterns — PDF generation (react-pdf, pdf-lib, pdfkit), Office documents (docxtemplater, xlsx-populate), file storage with Cloudflare R2 via S3-compat SDK.
